options.purpose: Define form items, groups, tabs, and buttons.
Set the base number of layout columns.
Set responsive column counts for screen sizes.
Set minimum column width before layout adapts.
Place labels relative to editors.
Map container width to screen size names.
Enable internal form scrolling.
Control label punctuation.

validationRules: Use colCountByScreen for responsive forms instead of CSS-only editor repositioning.
Use top labels for narrow forms when horizontal label space is constrained.

options.purpose: Associate the form with a validation group.
Show a validation summary for the form.
Attach DevExtreme validation rules to a form item.
Mark a simple item as required.
Add accessible labels and stable input attributes.

validationRules: Include validationRules for user input that can be submitted.
Use inputAttr or labels so editors remain accessible when labels are hidden or custom.

options.purpose: Choose the form item kind such as simple, group, tabbed, button, or empty.
Set how many form columns an item spans.
Bind an item to a field in formData.
Choose a DevExtreme editor for a form item.
Configure the selected editor.
Provide the data object edited by the form.

validationRules: Use editorType and editorOptions before custom HTML for standard inputs.
Keep editor options local to the item unless multiple editors share the same behavior.

options.purpose: Make form editors read-only.
Make one form editor read-only.
Show or hide individual items.

validationRules: Use readOnly for review flows where values should remain selectable and readable.
Use disabled only when the control should be excluded from interaction semantics.
